title: The Apathetic Boy and the Girl in a Bottle
overview: Yuu is a young boy who is a Healer, a special magic user who can calm the hearts of angry monsters. Merc is a young fairy creature who lives in a bottle. They're about to set out on a journey with Mr. Fluffball, a small fluffball creature, in this relaxing and easygoing adventure.

title: The King of Dawn and the Imprisoned Bride
overview: The crew sets off! It's a wide world full of adventure, and first up it's off to the village of the animal people, where a princess is being forced into a marriage she wants no part in.

title: The Tomboy Fairy and the Spring-Eating Dragon (Part 1)
overview: The party arrives at the land of the fairies, where they're transformed into miniature versions of themselves. But even though they're small, there's big trouble!

title: The Tomboy Fairy and the Spring-Eating Dragon (Part 2)
overview: The group travels to meet the spring-eating dragon. In the process, they learn more about the forest and the fairy country.

title: The Red Star of Evil and the Brilliant Ruler of Superior Flame
overview: Yuu and his friends come to a small village where a princess is cursed. They try to help her break the curse and make her free.

title: The Lord with You in Dreams and the Town of Oblivion (Part 1)
overview: A girl gets lost in the mysterious world of dreams, as Yuu travels to the land of the dead.

title: The Lord with You in Dreams and the Town of Oblivion (Part 2)
overview: Yuu is trapped in the land of dreams, where he begins to remember his past.

title: The King of the Song Altar and the Diva in a Cage (Part 1)
overview: The party comes to the land of birds, where one's status is decided by the beauty of their singing voice. There, they meet a young girl from the countryside who wants to a diva more than anything...

title: The King of the Song Altar and the Diva in a Cage (Part 2)
overview: A new Diva has been born, and the old one has lost her voice. Now a creature beneath the city begins to stir...

title: The Angel Who Couldn`t Fly and the Holy Wings of Ten Thousand Prayers (Part 1)
overview: The wagon is traveling down the road when it's attacked by flying monsters, and Yuu and Merc are picked up and carried into the sky! There they land on a floating continent, whose inhabitants are less than friendly...

title: The Angel Who Couldn't Fly and the Holy Wings of Ten Thousand Prayers (Part 2)
overview: Yuu goes to rescue Merc from the floating continent. Along the way, he and his new friend are captured by the palace guard, who have less than benevolent intentions...

title: The Healer and the Friend in a Bottle
overview: Merc and Yuu are back home after their long journey. Merc thinks that Yuu was mad he spent so much time away from home, but Yuu has a special present for her...
